div.head: The Consul General at Canton (Jenkins) to the Acting Secretary of State
div.p: Referring to the Legation’s telegram January 8, 10 a.m.,Copy apparently not received in the Department; see Department’s telegram No. 6, January 6, to the Chargé in China, p. 360. I visited informally Mayor of Canton on January 11 when I took occasion to assure him of cooperation of American Consulate General and discussed several pending matters. Mayor has arranged to return visit today. Other Consuls are pursuing similar course, and relations now seem well established. Department and Legation informed.
